title: Worksheets are hidden by default
author: Tilogorn

comments.author: mram888
brihter
comments.body:
@Tilogorn Can confirm.

@mram888 I disagree. When adding a sheet one expects it to be visible. `{state: 'visible'}` should be the default behavior.

comments.author: Tilogorn
comments.body: @wickedsheep I think it was more ment as  a temporary workaround (answering my question for one). Looks like WIP when you take the missing docs into account.

comments.body: it works for xlsx not for csv
